title: Germán A. Tessmer
text:
Germán A. Tessmer
I am an economist at Universidad Nacional de Rosario (UNR), where I direct the Observatorio Económico Social and teach Econometrics. My work is grounded in labor economics — informality, wage premia, and employment dynamics in Argentina — and carried out with the methods that now define rigorous applied research: causal inference, machine learning for variable selection, and AI-assisted empirical workflows.
C.V.  ·  Research
email: ger.tessmer@gmail.com  ·  german.tessmer@unr.edu.ar

title: Curriculum Vitae
text:
Experience

Institutional Management & Research

Director, Observatorio Económico Social UNR (2019–present). Leadership of a research and communication unit under the Vice-Rectorate. Production of open data, economic reports, and public-facing analysis for policymakers, journalists, and the general public.
Deputy Director, Observatorio Económico Social UNR (2014–2019).

title: Research
text:
Reports & Outreach
Director and co-author of over 60 research and outreach reports published between 2015 and 2024 through the Observatorio Económico Social UNR (ISSN 2683-9067), covering labor markets, monetary policy, housing, energy, and regional economics. All reports are available through the UNR institutional repository.
